rules.name: Patent Office Departments
rules.description: Matches specific departments of the German Patent and Trade Mark Office including class numbers and full context.

rules.name: Single Letter Companies (Strict)
rules.description: Matches single letter or hyphenated codes followed by GmbH/AG/KB, ensuring it's a distinct entity name and not part of a larger phrase.

rules.name: Bundesverwaltungsgericht Genitive
rules.description: Matches 'Bundesverwaltungsgericht' and its genitive form 'Bundesverwaltungsgerichts'.

rules.name: Bundesverfassungsgericht Genitive
rules.description: Matches 'Bundesverfassungsgericht' and its genitive form 'Bundesverfassungsgerichts'.

rules.name: Bundespatentgericht
rules.description: Matches 'Bundespatentgericht' and its genitive form.

rules.name: Bundesgerichtshof Genitive
rules.description: Matches 'Bundesgerichtshof' and its genitive form 'Bundesgerichtshofs' and 'Bundesgerichtshofes'.

rules.name: European Union
rules.description: Matches 'Europäischen Union' in various cases.

rules.name: Bundeswehr
rules.description: Matches 'Bundeswehr' and its variations.

rules.name: Specific German Organizations
rules.description: Matches specific German organizations and associations found in training data, including genitive forms, specific names, and abbreviations that were previously missed.

rules.name: Hyphenated Company Names
rules.description: Matches company names with hyphens or specific patterns like 'E K-Konzerns' or 'A-GbR' that were missed by generic patterns.

rules.name: Specific Organization Names
rules.description: Matches specific organization names found in training data, including quoted brands, abbreviations, and multi-word names.
rules.content: \b(?:D P T S GmbH|Becker Mining|Becker|Europ\u00e4ische Gerichtshof|EuGH|EU|BSG|GmSOGB|BVerfG|ZDS|Oberlandesgerichts D\u00fcsseldorf|FACEYOURMUSIC|Bundesrat|F\. D\.|\u201e JOOP \u201e|\u201e Arrow \u201e|\u201e BEAST \u201e|\u201e KONTRON \u201e|Bund Deutscher Verwaltungsrichter und Verwaltungsrichterinnen|BDVR|ARD|ZDF|Deutschlandfunk|AGH H\.|M \u2026|Bundesvereinigung der Arbeitgeberverb\u00e4nde|Generalstaatsanwalt in M\u00fcnchen|Oberlandesgericht M\u00fcnchen|Beruflichen Schulzentrum f\u00fcr Technik und Wirtschaft P|C- B\. V\.|S AG|C GmbH|VW Tiguan|Bundeskanzleramt|Landgericht F\. \( P\. \)|Oberverwaltungsgerichts f\u00fcr das Land Nordrhein-Westfalen|Gemeinsamen Senats der obersten Gerichtsh\u00f6fe des Bundes)\b

rules.name: Ellipsis Company Names
rules.description: Matches company names containing ellipsis (e.g., 'S …', 'R … GmbH & Co. KG', 'M … Konzerns') with correct suffix handling.

rules.name: Single Letter Entities
rules.description: Matches single letter entities often used as anonymized names in legal texts, e.g., 'A', 'H', 'Wi.', 'T.', 'K.'.

rules.name: International Court
rules.description: Matches 'Internationale Gerichtshof' specifically.

rules.name: Specific Court Names with Location (Fixed)
rules.description: Matches court names with location, ensuring the court type is present and not just the location, handling multi-word locations like 'Frankfurt am Main' and hyphenated locations like 'Niedersachsen-Bremen'.

rules.name: Specific Court Genitives with Location (Fixed)
rules.description: Matches court names in genitive form followed by location, ensuring the court type is present.

rules.name: Missing Specific Organizations
rules.description: Matches specific organizations found in training data that were missed, including Schott AG, Europäisches Patentamt, Fliegerhorst, Monster Abwehr Spray, DB, GBA, etc.

rules.name: Anonymized Single Letter Companies (Fixed)
rules.description: Matches anonymized company names like 'w GmbH', 'H. AG', 'A-AG', 'M. GmbH' using single letters or initials, specifically targeting court and organization contexts.

rules.name: Patent Department Full Context (Fixed)
rules.description: Matches specific patent department names with class numbers and the full parent organization name.

rules.name: Specific Ministry Names (Fixed)
rules.description: Matches specific long-form ministry names including genitive endings and department codes.

rules.name: Union and Associations (Fixed)
rules.description: Matches specific unions and associations like ver.di, IG Metall, etc.

rules.name: Specific Organization Names (Extended)
rules.description: Matches specific organization names found in training data that are not covered by general patterns, including 'Actavis', 'VCS', 'ADAC', 'JOOP', 'tunesischen Justizministerium', 'Gewerkschaft Erziehung und Wissenschaft', 'X-EWIV', 'A Neurologischen Klinik B', 'Deutsche Wetterdienst', 'A-Vereins', 'Bayerischen Staatsregierung'.

rules.name: Generic Court Abbreviations (Tightened)
rules.description: Matches high-priority court abbreviations, ensuring they are standalone and not part of a larger word.

rules.name: Single Letter Companies with Punctuation
rules.description: Matches single letter or hyphenated codes with punctuation followed by GmbH/AG/KB.

rules.name: Specific Organization Names (Additional)
rules.description: Matches additional specific organizations like 'Bundesanstalt für Finanzdienstleistungsaufsicht', 'VKDA', 'TFS', 'w GmbH', 'm …', 'BSZ F …', 'Ernst-Moritz-Arndt-Universität Greifswald', 'Staatlichen Hochschule für Musik und darstellende Kunst in Ma.', 'Dignitas Deutschland', 'Staatsanwaltschaft München I', 'Flughafen Frankfurt am Main', 'UNHCR', 'BAMF', 'TGAOK', 'VBL', 'Electronicon-GmbH', 'X-GmbH & Co. KG', 'A-AG'.

rules.name: Specific Court Names with Location (Genitive)
rules.description: Matches court names in genitive form followed by location, e.g., 'Landgerichts Bückeburg', 'Landgerichts Traunstein', and complex genitive forms.

rules.name: Anonymized Ellipsis Companies
rules.description: Matches anonymized company names containing ellipsis (e.g., 'S …', 'R … GmbH & Co. KG', 'M … Konzerns') with correct suffix handling.

rules.name: Finanzamt and Staatsanwaltschaft
rules.description: Matches Finanzamt and Staatsanwaltschaft with location or anonymized names.

rules.name: Anonymized Company Patterns
rules.description: Matches anonymized company names with single letters, dots, or ellipsis followed by legal forms.

rules.name: Quoted Brand Names (Strict)
rules.description: Matches brand names enclosed in German quotation marks, excluding common non-brand terms like 'Entscheidungen', 'Urteil', 'Beschluss', etc.

rules.name: Court Names with Anonymized Location
rules.description: Matches court names followed by an anonymized single letter location (e.g., 'Amtsgericht P.', 'Landgericht F.').
